table-379-379.caption: What are the foiled cards that are incredibly powerful when paired with non foiled cards? List the IDs.
data: Provides fast mana, amplified with non-foil ramp spells.
Consistent mana fixing, benefits from non-foil color-intensive spells.
Discourages opponents from casting spells, overwhelming with non-foil card advantage.
Creates Treasure tokens, exponentially stronger with non-foil token synergies.
Overloads to bounce opponent's non-land permanents, devastating with non-foil control elements.
